summary: Security Audit Dashboard Testing Complete - All tests passed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working. Security Audit tab in Enterprise page displays real-time security metrics with auto-refresh functionality.

issues: Minor: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) on initial load - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

backend_api_tests: Response contains all required keys: stats, failed_logins, locked_accounts, suspicious_ips, timeline, critical_events
Stats contains all required fields: failed_logins_24h, success_logins_24h, locked_accounts, active_sessions, revoked_tokens_24h, critical_events_24h, twofa_coverage
failed_logins is a list with proper structure
suspicious_ips is a list with ip and attempts fields
timeline is a list with date, failed, success, total fields (7-day data)
critical_events is a list with action/severity fields
locked_accounts is a list with email field
All numeric stats are valid non-negative numbers
frontend_ui_tests: Enterprise page loads with Security Audit tab visible
Security Audit tab content loads with data-testid='security-audit-tab'
Suspicious IPs section displays with IP and attempt count
Failed logins list shows email, IP and timestamp
Critical events list shows action, email and timestamp

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_security_audit_dashboard.py (new test file for security audit dashboard)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing admin account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Audit Dashboard feature fully verified. Backend endpoint GET /api/audit/security-dashboard requires admin role (non-admin gets 403). Returns stats (failed_logins_24h, success_logins_24h, locked_accounts, active_sessions, revoked_tokens_24h, critical_events_24h, twofa_coverage), failed_logins list, locked_accounts list, suspicious_ips list, timeline (7-day data), and critical_events list. Frontend SecurityAuditTab component in Enterprise page displays all data with auto-refresh (15s interval). All data-testid attributes present for testing.

feature_verification.feature: Security Audit Panel in Enterprise Page
